flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Piedmont Virginia Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Piedmont Virginia Community College rose 40% between 2006 and 2009 (12.6% → 17.6%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Piedmont Virginia Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (57.2% → 67.7%).
